final:
module arithmetic_operation(
    input clk,
    input rst,
    input [7:0] a,
    input [3:0] b,
    output reg [11:0] c
);

  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if(rst) begin
        c <= 0;
    end else begin
        c <= a + (b << 8);
    end
end

endmodule
